name: Crawfish Etouffee II
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Parsley - minced OR 1 teaspoon Parsley flakes (dried)
2 1/2 cups Crawfish Meat - OR 1 pound Crawfish meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in an iron skillet or heavy pot.
2. Saute onions, garlic, green pepper, and celery until onions are clear.
3. Add 1/8 cup water and simmer covered until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Add crawfish fat and cook covered for 15 minutes on very low heat, stirring occasionally.
5. Add tails and other seasonings. Cook for another 15 minutes.
6. Add green onion tops and parsley and cook for an additional 5 minutes for seasoning to blend.
7. Serve with hot steamed rice.
8. Serves 4-5
Note: This recipe was submitted by Eugene Cottrell from Shreveport, LA.
